title: Americans Injured in Iranian Missile Strike on Kuwaiti Air Base
content:
Americans have been injured.
*   The injuries occurred during an Iranian missile strike.
*   The missile strike targeted a Kuwaiti air base.

title: SEBI slaps ₹28.6 crore penalty on Suzlon Energy for ‘accounting fraud’
content:
SEBI (Securities and Exchange Board of India) has imposed a penalty on Suzlon Energy.
*   The penalty amounts to ₹28.6 crore.
*   The reason for this penalty is identified as 'accounting fraud'.

title: Forex reserves drops $7.5 billion to $681.38 billion
content:
Foreign exchange (forex) reserves have decreased.
*   The decline amounted to $7.5 billion.
*   The total reserves now stand at $681.38 billion.

title: RBI data shows why the government is concerned about dollars flowing out of India
content:
RBI data indicates a significant trend of US dollars flowing out of India.
*   This outflow has become a source of concern for the Indian government.
*   The government's worry likely stems from potential negative impacts such as a weakening rupee, depleting foreign exchange reserves, and broader economic instability.

title: Counterfeit currency detections rise 5.7% in FY26, led by ₹200, ₹500 notes: RBI
content:
Detection of counterfeit currency increased by 5.7% in Fiscal Year 2026.
*   The rise was primarily driven by fake ₹200 and ₹500 notes.
*   This information was reported by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).

title: Financial institutions report over 10,000 cases of fraud involving ₹48,000 crore in FY26: RBI data
content:
Financial institutions reported over 10,000 cases of fraud.
*   These fraud cases collectively involved a staggering ₹48,000 crore.
*   The incidents occurred during Fiscal Year 2026, according to data released by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).

title: Indian economy to remain resilient in FY27 despite West Asia conflict impact: RBI in Annual Report
content:
The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) predicts the Indian economy will remain resilient.
*   This positive outlook is projected to hold through Fiscal Year 2027 (FY27).
*   The forecast accounts for and withstands the impact of the West Asia conflict.

title: China building launch pads near nuclear missile silos
content:
China is constructing new launch pads.
*   These launch pads are being built in close proximity to existing nuclear missile silos.
*   The construction suggests an expansion of China's missile capabilities, potentially enhancing its nuclear arsenal or delivery systems.

title: Supreme Court issues guidelines for protecting survivors of human trafficking
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The Supreme Court has issued new guidelines.
*   These guidelines are specifically aimed at protecting survivors of human trafficking.
*   The directive seeks to establish protocols for their safety and support.

title: Supreme Court sets aside 'fraud' findings, disgorgement of ₹447 crore in 2007 RPL Futures Trading case
content:
The Supreme Court has overturned previous 'fraud' findings.
*   This decision sets aside the disgorgement penalty of ₹447 crore.
*   The ruling pertains to the 2007 RPL Futures Trading case.
